texts.Description:SessionInactiveDays: Duration of inactive conversation, unit: days.
texts.Description:InactivityPeriodDays: The duration since the last login, in units of days, defaults to 180 days if it is empty.
texts.Description:GracePeriodDays: The duration since the account was deactivated, in units of days. If the value is empty, it defaults to 60 days.
